history.content:
<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly in front is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path is to my right, so I should turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The area to the left is mostly lava, while the open path appears to continue to the right, so I will turn right to face the safer direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up. The cell directly in front is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open path appears to the left side of my current position, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me appears to be a wall, so moving forward would be blocked. I need to reorient to find a safe path around the lava and toward unexplored space. Turning left is the safest next step to change direction and inspect a different corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cells directly ahead are unknown/blocked by the wall layout. The safest immediate progress is to move forward into the open floor cell in front of me, since the path to the right is constrained by walls and lava is visible further away. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
